info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing products, orders, and customers in the Ecommerce-buildTime platform.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including listing, adding, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, and processing customer orders.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer information, authentication, and profiles.

post.description: Allows a new user to register by providing required user details in the request body. On successful registration, returns the created user profile.

example.message: Provided user details are invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order associated with the specified userId. Input parameters must be provided. Returns details of the placed order upon success.

example.message: The order request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: User ID is required and must be valid

example.message: No user found with the provided userId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about the order identified by the specified orderId.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.
No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product and quantity to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must contain details of the cart item to add.

example.message: The cart item details are invalid or incomplete.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the contents of a user's shopping cart
get.description: Fetches the current items in the shopping cart for the user identified by userId.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Retrieve the current tracking information for a specific order using its unique identifier. Provides shipment status, expected delivery date, and carrier details.

example.message: The order with the given ID was not found for tracking

details.issue: No order exists with this ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry in the product catalog. Requires product details such as name, description, price, and stock availability. Returns the created product data.

requestBody.description: Product details to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

example.message: The provided product data is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same SKU already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment provider webhook events
post.description: Handles incoming webhook notifications from payment providers regarding payment status updates, chargebacks, or refunds. Processes the event and updates payment records accordingly.

requestBody.description: Payload received from the payment provider webhook

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields
Payment could not be processed
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details including amount, currency, and payment method. Returns payment processing status and transaction identifier.

requestBody.description: Payment details for initiating the transaction

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing fields

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment processor
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message received from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction provided by the gateway

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last update to the order

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the user account was created

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last update to the user's profile

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

description.example: A high-precision wireless mouse with ergonomic design.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

quantity.description: The number of units of the product ordered

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied per unit of the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart

productId.description: Unique identifier for the cart product

price.description: Unit price of the product before any discount

finalPrice.description: Price per unit after applying discount

currency.description: Currency code for the price values

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the tracked order

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier or delivery partner

status.description: Current status of the order delivery

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items in the cart before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Sum of all discounts applied in the cart

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values

userId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last cart update

amount.description: Total amount to be charged in the transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g. credit card, PayPal

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway processing the payment

phone.description: User's phone number in international format

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency code of the user in ISO 4217

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction generated by the payment gateway

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

category.description: Category under which the product is listed

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

message.description: Detailed error message explaining what went wrong

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred

path.description: Requested API endpoint path that caused the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the specific request

details.description: List of detailed error information per invalid field

field.description: Name of the field with the issue

issue.description: Description of the problem with the field

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed message describing the server failure

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the specific request
